titleStmt.title: SII 30.111: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 111. (A.R. No. 189 of 1915.) Brahmadēśam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara Temple-on the north wall of the central shrine Pārtivēndiravarman: year 4: 963 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 12(1/4) kaḻañju of gold for providing food offerings and for burning a perpetual lamp to the image of Riṣabhavāhaṉa in the temple of Śrī Pōndaip-perumāṉaḍigaḷ of Rājamallach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam at Tiruvēgambapuṟam in Dāmark-kōṭṭam, by a person called Siṅgaperumāḷ. The mahāsabhā received the gold and sold three hundred kuḻi of land free from taxes for this purpose and agreed to carry out the endowment out of the yield of the land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koppārttiventrātipatipanmarkku yāṇṭu 4 Āvatu tāmar
kkoṭṭattu tiruvekampapuṟattu Irāja[mallacatu]rvvetimaṅkalattu śrī pontaip
perumā(ṉa)naṭikaḷukku ciṅkaperumāḷ ma tiru ṉ tirumeṉi Iṣa bhavā
haṉarkku Oru tiruvamirtukkum Oru nantāviḷakkukkum Iṭuvitta poṉ paṉṉiru kaḻañcey kāl
Ippoṉ koṇṭu paravipulattu merkkaṭaiya muṉṉūṟu kuḻi viṟṟu kuṭuttom mahāsabhai
perumakka(ḷ)ḷom viṟṟu Iṟai Iḻicci kuṭuttom Innilam koṇṭu Orupoḻtut
tiruamirtu AiyviḻakkuRead- aiy uḻakkuAriciyāl kāṭṭuvatākavum Oru nantā viḷakku Erip
patākavum Ipparicu śan=tirātityar Uḷḷaḷavum ni
ṟpatāka vaittom mahāsabhaip perumakkaḷom Iddharmmam śrī koyil vāriyap peru
makkaḷey rakṣippārākavum Iddharmmattukku keṭu niṉaittār Ittiruvamirtum tiruvi
ḷakkum Iṟakkiṉār pāvattiṟ paṭuvār [ Iddharmmam rakṣi] ppār [śrī]pādam Eṉṟalai melaṉa .
Digital edition of SII 30.111 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
